creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
Maintainer update of mail/mutt:

	- Remove deprecated SASL1 support

Hint: mutt-1.4.x only supports SASL1 not SASL2, thus the SASL-support had to
be removed. Users needing SASL support can switch to the mutt-devel port. The
removal of the SASL1 support has been requested by one of the ports-managers
(Gabor Kovesdan <gabor@FreeBSD.org>).
